version: v1 (simplified — regime ratio adjustment, not Stan refit)
method: For each playoff player: project per-min rate = RS per-min × (playoff cohort median ratio per stat). Project minutes = RS MPG × playoff MPG ratio. Project per-game = per-min × minutes.
deviation_from_pre_reg: No pre-reg locked for v1; this is a regime-adjustment layer pending a separate Stan playoff refit (v2).
